name: z8lua
reason: Pinned sources support the compatibility-kernel bootstrap. A tested local tonum patch is applied, while corpus syntax gaps remain release blockers.
local_patches: lpico8lib.c: official tonum flags 0x3 raw 16:16 bits and flags 0x4 fallback
